title: Tetsu Clan
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] clan|other uses of the word [[Tetsu (disambiguation)]]}}
[[File:Greedo-NEGTC.png|thumb|right|200px|Greedo, arguably the most famous member of Tetsu Clan]]
{{Quote|His clan are all sentenced to die.|Neesh|<ref name="ahf">{{StoryCite|story=A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref>}}
The '''Tetsu Clan''', alternatively known as the '''Tetsus''',<ref name="db">{{DB|character|greedo|Greedo}}</ref> was a clan of [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]] from the planet [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]. 

They were forced to flee during the [[Rodian Clan Wars]] and some colonized a [[U-Tendik|jungle planet]].<ref name="tales">{{StoryCite|story=A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref>

When [[Navik/Legends|Navik the Red]] ordered his own [[Chattza clan/Legends|Chattza Clan]] to exterminate them, some Tetsus fled first to [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia's]] moon [[Enak/Legends|Enak]], Navik's killers eventually tracked them down, killing a number and dispersing the rest. 

Navik also personally attacked them on the jungle planet in [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]].<ref name="tales" />

A group moved to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] to hide in the densely populated underworld.

The most notable member of the Clan was the infamous [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]], killed by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. It also included his cousin [[Beedo/Legends|Beedo]] and his uncle [[Avaro Sookcool]].

==Behind the scenes==
In both ''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' and ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'', the singular form of "Tetsu" was spelled as "Tetsus."
